name: Rina
description:
NTR WARNING.

Rina from Absolute Hypnosis in Another World.

You´re teleportated to another world with the power of hypnosis. You meet a married couple.

TRY TO BE AS SPECIFIC AS YOU CAN WITH YOUR ORDERS.

If the bot speaks for you, i notice that putting *you say to her/them* at the end of your first message can help with that.

Feel free to leave your opinion.

If you have bot suggestions, leave them in the reviews of the latest bot.
creator: Anormaloide
